details.reasoning: The implementation fully satisfies all rubric requirements: (1) ImageTextToTextPipeline class defined with async _call method; (2) accepts image and text prompt parameters with proper processing; (3) imports and uses AutoModelForImageTextToText; (4) calls model.generate() to produce output; (5) handles image preprocessing and returns generated_text in correct format; (6) registered in SUPPORTED_TASKS as 'image-text-to-text' with type 'multimodal'; (7) comprehensive JSDoc with proper @typedef definitions for ImageTextToTextSingle, ImageTextToTextOutput, and callback types, plus helpful usage example; (8) follows existing pipeline patterns (extends Pipeline, constructor, tokenizer usage); (9) no modifications to existing pipeline classes. Additionally, the implementation demonstrates sophisticated handling of processor-specific text/image argument ordering through the TEXT_FIRST_PROCESSORS set, showing good domain knowledge without breaking existing functionality.
